# Playground

Test and experiment with ScrapeGraphAI API endpoints API Key: sgai-e62a81a3-8c45-46c3-865d-f94464a00f13 Remaining credits: 40 / 50 [BUTTON (button): Smart Smart Scraper] [BUTTON (button): Search Search Scraper] [BUTTON (button): Markdown Markdownify] [BUTTON (button): Scrape Scrape] [BUTTON (button): Crawler Smart Crawler] [BUTTON (button): Sitemap Sitemap] Extract structured data from a single webpage
 cost: 10 credits [TEXTAREA placeholder="https://example.com, https://example2.com, https://example3.com"] [TEXTAREA placeholder="Describe what you want to extract..."] [BUTTON: Advanced Options] [BUTTON: Get code] [BUTTON: Create Schema] [BUTTON: Start scraping ⌘ + Enter] ScrapeGraphAI Terminal [BUTTON: Feedback?] $ SmartScraper completed successfully > Request ID: e68ba38c-70a9-4351-bbc9-92cc1d904ba8 > Result: { "instrument_name": "Manulife Strategic Income Fund Series F", "symbol": "MMF659.CF", "currency": "CAD", "nav_price": 11.3848, "open_price": 11.3848, "five_day_low": 11.3794, "five_day_high": 11.3895, "source": "The Globe and Mail", "note": "Nav price information not found in the provided content." } ▊
[/MAIN] [LINK: Book a Call → https://calendly.com/lorenzo-padoan-scrapegraphai/30min] [BUTTON: Upgrade] [BUTTON: Toggle theme] ## Code Examples [BUTTON (button): Python] [BUTTON (button): JavaScript] [BUTTON (button): cURL] [BUTTON: Copy] 1 import { Client } from 'scrapegraph-js' ; 2 3 // Initialize the client 4 const client = new Client ( { apiKey : 'sgai-e62a81a3-8c45-46c3-865d-f94464a00f13' } ) ; 5 6 // SmartScraper request 7 try { 8 const response = await client . smartScraper ( { 9 websiteUrl : "https://www.theglobeandmail.com/investing/markets/funds/MMF659.CF/" , 10 userPrompt : "Nav price" 11 } ) ; 12 13 console . log ( 'Result:' , response ) ; 14 } catch ( error ) { 15 console . error ( 'Error:' , error ) ; 16 } This code uses your current form values and API key. Make sure to keep your API key secure and never commit it to version control.
 Official SDKs: [LINK: Python → https://github.com/ScrapeGraphAI/scrapegraph-py] [LINK: JavaScript → https://github.com/ScrapeGraphAI/scrapegraph-js] [LINK: Documentation → https://docs.scrapegraphai.com/introduction] [BUTTON (button): Close]
